narrative:
Vermillion-Combined township has 1,835 registered voters, with 44.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 46.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.7 percentage points.
